items.title: Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has made several major announcements in early 2026. The most significant is the April 7, 2026 unveiling of Claude Mythos Preview, a new general-purpose language model with exceptional capability in computer security tasks. Alongside this, Anthropic launched Project Glasswing, an initiative to use Mythos Preview to help secure the world's most critical software. Additionally, Anthropic announced an expanded partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation c

items.title: Claude by Anthropic - Release Notes - April 2026
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: Anthropic had a major start to 2026 with several significant model releases and feature rollouts. On February 5, 2026, the company launched Claude Opus 4.6 featuring a 1-million-token context window, stronger coding and planning capabilities, improved financial analysis (top score on the Finance Agent benchmark), and a 14.5-hour task completion horizon — the longest of any AI model. Claude Sonnet 4.6 also launched around the same time with a full skills upgrade across coding, computer use, long-

items.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 - Anthropic
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has made several significant API updates in early 2026. The most notable is the launch of Claude Managed Agents in public beta — a fully managed agent harness enabling Claude to run as an autonomous agent with secure sandboxing, built-in tools, and server-sent event streaming. All managed agent endpoints require the `managed-agents-2026-04-01` beta header. Alongside this, Anthropic launched the `ant` CLI, a command-line client for the Claude API that integrates natively with Claude Cod

items.title: Anthropic on X: Project Glasswing announcement
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Anthropic's most significant recent announcement on @AnthropicAI is the introduction of **Claude Mythos Preview** and **Project Glasswing**, unveiled around April 7–8, 2026. Claude Mythos is a frontier model capable of finding software vulnerabilities better than all but the most skilled human security researchers. Project Glasswing is an urgent defensive cybersecurity initiative powered by Mythos, aimed at securing the world's most critical software infrastructure. Anthropic clarified that Myth
